aaliyah nye.comment: Nye (knee) is questionable for Thursday's game against the Storm.

brionna jones.comment: The Dream expect Jones (knee) to resume team activities in the coming weeks, per Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com.

chloe bibby.comment: Bibby (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against Phoenix, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.

maddy westbeld.comment: Westbeld (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Mercury, Kareem Copeland of ESPN reports.

skylar diggins.comment: Diggins (knee) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against Phoenix.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) will remain on the inactive list for Sunday's game against the Aces.

rickea jackson.comment: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

saniya rivers.comment: Rivers (ankle) won't return to Thursday's game against Minnesota. She will finish with five points (2-5 FG, 0-2 3Pt, 1-2 FT), one rebound, two assists, two steals and one block across nine minutes.

hailey van lith.comment: Van Lith (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx.

ashlon jackson.comment: Jackson (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx.

brittney griner.comment: Griner is out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx due to a left quadriceps strain.

aneesah morrow.comment: Morrow is out for Wednesday's game against the Lynx due to personal reasons.

gabby williams.comment: Williams won't return to Wednesday's game against the Tempo due to a back contusion, Kenzo Fukuda of ClutchPoints.com reports. She'll finish with seven points (3-9 FG, 1-3 3Pt), two assists, one steal and one rebound in 18 minutes.

ashten prechtel.comment: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Tempo.

miela sowah.comment: Sowah (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Tempo.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

caitlin clark.comment: Clark (back) posted nine points (4-12 FG, 1-6 3Pt), four rebounds, three assists and one steal across 16 minutes in Wednesday's 106-92 loss to the Sparks. She won't play in Thursday's game against Phoenix, Scott Agness of FieldhouseFiles.com reports.

aliyah boston.comment: Boston (lower leg) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sparks but will be available for Thursday's game against Phoenix, per Chloe Peterson of The Indianapolis Star.

cameron brink.comment: Brink (ankle) will be re-evaluated in two weeks, John W. Davis of Long Beach Press-Telegram reports.

kelsey plum.comment: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

justine pissott.comment: Pissott (not with team) has been ruled out for Thursday's game against the Fire.

janiah barker.comment: Barker (leg) has been ruled out for Thursday's game against Portland.

dana evans.comment: Evans (leg) is listed as doubtful for Thursday's game in Portland.

a'ja wilson.comment: Wilson (leg) is listed as questionable for Thursday's game against the Fire.

olivia miles.comment: Miles (calf) is out for Wednesday's game against the Sun.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier (ankle) has been cleared to resume practices with the Lynx, the team announced Wednesday.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

rebecca allen.comment: Allen sustained an apparent nasal injury in the fourth quarter of Tuesday's 88-77 loss to the Wings and did not return, finishing with one block in four minutes.

leonie fiebich.comment: Fiebich (foot) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against Dallas.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb (knee) is listed as probable for Thursday's game against the Fever.

alyssa thomas.comment: Thomas (foot) is listed as probable for Thursday's game against Indiana.

jovana nogic.comment: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

karlie samuelson.comment: Samuelson (finger) is listed as questionable for Thursday's game against Las Vegas.

sania feagin.comment: Feagin (knee) has been ruled out for Thursday's game against the Aces.

taina mair.comment: Mair (coach's decision) is out for Thursday's game against the Dream.

nyara sabally.comment: Sabally won't return to Wednesday's game against the Valkyries due to a left knee injury, Ian Finlayson of Sportsnet reports. She'll finish with two points (1-1 FG), one rebound and one assist in seven minutes.

ornella bankole.comment: Bankole (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against Golden State.

temi fagbenle.comment: Fagbenle (eye) is out for Wednesday's game against the Valkyries, Chelsea Leite of TSN reports.

brittney sykes.comment: Sykes (foot) will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

kiki rice.comment: Rice (ankle) remains sidelined by a Grade 3 left ankle sprain, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

sonia citron.comment: Citron (knee) is out for Monday's game against the Valkyries.

darianna littlepage-buggs.comment: Littlepage-Buggs (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Monday's game against Golden State.
